name: tinyfish-agent-run
description: Run a TinyFish automation agent against a URL and stream live STARTED/PROGRESS/COMPLETE events as one-line JSON so a caller can surface each step as it happens.

interface.shortDescription: Run a TinyFish automation agent against a URL and stream live STARTED/PROGRESS/COMPLETE events as one-line JSON so a caller can surface each step as it happens.
interface.longDescription: Verify TINYFISH_API_KEY is set, run scripts/agent-run.sh <url> <goal>, and parse the streamed JSON events for live progress and the final result payload.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me use TinyFish Agent Run safely.
